name: The Love of Winter
original_name: ก่อนฤดูหนาวผ่าน
overview: Kinn, seeking solace in Northern Thailand, loses his phone and travel plans due to his playful friends Namjai and Tib, leading him to connect with Thitnuea, a local guide with deep roots in the region.

trailers.title: Official Trailer [The Love Of Winter] |  28 MDP Studio
